moments.title: Messi breaks World Cup scoring record
moments.blurb: Lionel Messi became the all-time leading World Cup goalscorer today, surpassing Miroslav Klose's record with two goals in Argentina's 2-0 victory over Austria in the group stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

angles.name: Historic Goalscorer
angles.copy: History made at the World Cup today! Lionel Messi has officially become the all-time leading goalscorer in the tournament's history. What a legend. #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Argentina vs Austria
angles.copy: Another two goals for Messi today as Argentina beat Austria 2-0 in the World Cup group stage. And that's a new all-time World Cup scoring record for the GOAT!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing, with group stage matches continuing across North America since its start on June 11 and running until the final on July 19.

angles.name: World Cup Daily Buzz
angles.copy: Who are you backing in the World Cup? The group stages are heating up with matches happening daily. Catch all the action!

angles.name: Match Day Excitement
angles.copy: Another day, another set of incredible World Cup matches. What's been your favourite game so far?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: Iconic pop star Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday today, June 22, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cyndi
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still shining bright and making us want to have fun. What's your favourite Cyndi track?

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: It's Cyndi Lauper's birthday! From 'Girls Just Want To Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', her music defined an era. Wishing her a fantastic 73rd!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival wraps up
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival, featuring headliners like The Cure, Lewis Capaldi, and Calvin Harris, concluded yesterday, June 21, 2026, after four days of music.

angles.name: IOWF Review
angles.copy: What a weekend! The Isle of Wight Festival wrapped up yesterday after an incredible four days of music. Who did you see, and what was your highlight?

angles.name: Post-Festival Blues
angles.copy: The tents are packed away and the ferry's docked. Already missing the Isle of Wight Festival vibes! What was your favourite set?

moments.title: Jason Mraz turns 49
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Jason Mraz, known for 'I'm Yours' and 'The Remedy (I Won't Worry)', celebrates his 49th birthday tomorrow, June 23, 2026.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Birthday Star
angles.copy: Get ready to wish a very happy 49th birthday to Jason Mraz tomorrow! What's the song that always puts a smile on your face?

angles.name: I'm Yours Forever
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Jason Mraz celebrates his 49th birthday! From coffeehouse acoustic to global hits, his voice is unmistakable.

moments.title: Chris Isaak turns 70
moments.blurb: American rock musician Chris Isaak, famous for his hit 'Wicked Game' and distinctive rockabilly style, will celebrate his 70th birthday on June 26, 2026.

angles.name: Wicked Game Turns 70
angles.copy: Next up for a big birthday this week: Chris Isaak turns 70 on Thursday! That voice, that style... timeless. What's your favourite Chris Isaak track?

angles.name: Rockabilly Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a future happy 70th to Chris Isaak this Thursday! The 'Wicked Game' singer has been delivering cool rockabilly vibes for decades.

moments.title: H.E.R. turns 29
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B sensation H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) will celebrate her 29th birthday on June 27, 2026.

angles.name: H.E.R. Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! This Saturday, H.E.R. turns 29! A true talent with Grammys and an Oscar already. What's your go-to H.E.R. song?

angles.name: R&B Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 29th birthday to the incredible H.E.R. this Saturday! She continues to push boundaries in R&B.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 is next week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the world's most prestigious tennis tournament, is set to begin next Monday, June 29, 2026, running for two weeks at the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost time for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon kicks off next Monday, June 29th. Are you ready for two weeks of world-class tennis?

angles.name: Grass Court Season
angles.copy: The grass courts are prepped and the players are ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts a week from today. Who are your picks for the titles?

moments.title: British Grand Prix just around the corner
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 at Silverstone is just over a week away, taking place from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: F1 Silverstone Excitement
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is next weekend, July 3rd-5th. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Silverstone Countdown
angles.copy: The roar of F1 is almost here! Get ready for the British Grand Prix at Silverstone next week. What's your favourite corner at the circuit?

moments.title: Glastonbury on fallow year
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking a planned 'fallow year' in 2026 to allow Worthy Farm to recover, with the next festival confirmed for June 2027.

angles.name: Missing Glasto
angles.copy: Feeling the Glastonbury shaped hole in your summer? Remember, 2026 is a fallow year – but we can start planning for 2027 now!

angles.name: Glasto's Rest
angles.copy: No Glastonbury this year as Worthy Farm takes its well-deserved rest. What are your fondest memories of the festival?
